Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x58DB "DINKYDOO-0400-58DB" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Dinky Doo.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0400 to set the maximum length of the keyboard buffer at $0289 to $08 to allow the game to run.
